examples: My head bumped against the doorframe.
This fellow was porcine to such a degree that he could not fit through the average doorframe without the aid of a crowbar.
Take a bunch of hyssop, dip it into the blood in the basin and put some of the blood on the top and on both sides of the doorframe.
Coming out into the sunlight, he leans against the doorframe and nods down to the water where his boat is moored.
Over a doorframe, del Toro had hung a Magic Marker skeleton drawn by his older daughter, Mariana, now fourteen.
